TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-ricah_uma 2021s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: usa lmamu a ricah hayan.
S.PHON: usa lmamu a ɾiʦaħ ħajan.
S.FORM: usa lmamu a ricah hayan.
S.PHON: usa lmamu a ɾiʦaħ ħajan.
S.TRANSL: 第一步去採收梅子.
First, go pick plums.

S.FORM: ma ricah kiya iya rebui qsiya ma asi a a rterucun a timu tikuh tikuh um rterucun timu tikuh ma.
S.PHON: ma ɾiʦaħ kija ija ɾebui qsija ma asi a a ɾteɾuʦun a timu tikuħ tikuħ um ɾteɾuʦun timu tikuħ ma.
S.FORM: ma ricah kiya iya rebui qsiya ma asi a a rterucun a timu tikuh tikuh um rterucun timu tikuh ma.
S.PHON: ma ɾiʦaħ kija ija ɾebui qsija ma asi a a ɾteɾuʦun a timu tikuħ tikuħ um ɾteɾuʦun timu tikuħ ma.
S.TRANSL: 然後梅子不要浸泡水,直接用少許鹽巴搓一搓.
Do not soak plums in water; rub them directly with a little bit of salt.

S.FORM: kika temaqun di si yiude yiudedapo ma hoN2T.
S.PHON: kika temaqun di si jiude jiudedapo ma ħon*t.
S.FORM: kika temaqun di si yiude yiudedapo ma hoN2T.
S.PHON: kika temaqun di si jiude jiudedapo ma ħon*t.
S.TRANSL: 接著人家說把它們打破.
Then break them, as some say.

S.FORM: temaqun di ma kika sinounsu qsiya ale a muse q uh qsiya tleetu leng.
S.PHON: temaqun di ma kika sinounsu qsija ale a muse q uħ qsija tleetu leŋ.
S.FORM: temaqun di ma kika sinounsu qsiya ale a muse q uh qsiya tleetu leng.
S.PHON: temaqun di ma kika sinounsu qsija ale a muse q uħ qsija tleetu leŋ.
S.TRANSL: 接著,人家說的,就把它們打破,接著你用冷開水沖洗.
And then, as others said, break them and you wash them with boiled water of room temperature.

S.FORM: sinoun kiya ma qluliun ka mngihunna si sinoi.
S.PHON: sinoun kija ma qluliun ka mŋiħunna si sinoi.
S.FORM: sinoun kiya ma qluliun ka mngihunna si sinoi.
S.PHON: sinoun kija ma qluliun ka mŋiħunna si sinoi.

TRANSL.notes: 人家說洗它們,然後水就會把他的(梅子的)苦味帶走.

S.TRANSL: 人家說洗它們,然後水就會把他的 苦味帶走.

TRANSL.notes: Wash them, and then the water will wash out its (the plum's) bitterness, as they say.

S.TRANSL: Wash them, and then the water will wash out its bitterness, as they say.

S.FORM: ma kika ma s mhedu smino smino di se asi angali baro di ma?
S.PHON: ma kika ma s mħedu smino smino di se asi aŋali baɾo di ma?
S.FORM: ma kika ma s mhedu smino smino di se asi angali baro di ma?
S.PHON: ma kika ma s mħedu smino smino di se asi aŋali baɾo di ma?

TRANSL.notes: 然後洗完以後,馬上把它們(從水裡)拿上來.

S.TRANSL: 然後洗完以後,馬上把它們 拿上來.
After finish washing, take them out of the water immediately.

S.FORM: anu ka osai mhido saso iya phidoi hido si.
S.PHON: anu ka osai mħido saso ija pħidoi ħido si.
S.FORM: anu ka osai mhido saso iya phidoi hido si.
S.PHON: anu ka osai mħido saso ija pħidoi ħido si.
S.TRANSL: 嗯,你就把它曬在陰涼之處,不要曬在太陽底下,他們是這樣說的.
And go bask them in shadow; do not bask them under the sun, as they say.

S.FORM: um osai a phido saso peni.
S.PHON: um osai a pħido saso peni.
S.FORM: um osai a phido saso peni.
S.PHON: um osai a pħido saso peni.
S.TRANSL: 就是曬在陰涼之處呀.
Just dry under the shade.

S.FORM: uka qsiya di si? purei ka satosu.
S.PHON: uka qsija di si? puɾei ka satosu.
S.FORM: uka qsiya di si? purei ka satosu.
S.PHON: uka qsija di si? puɾei ka satosu.

TRANSL.notes: 等到曬乾了(沒有水)的時候,就可以煮你所準備的砂糖了.

S.TRANSL: 等到曬乾了 的時候,就可以煮你所準備的砂糖了.

TRANSL.notes: When it becomes dry (without water), cook your sugar.

S.TRANSL: When it becomes dry , cook your sugar.

S.FORM: ma puresu sato de? mbuwa qsiya da kiya de posai sato ma kesun s'a micux peni micux sato ma kai kai a qsiya kii de kika gei ta hnuwaun di maanu di he a basounsu qsiya kii di ma.
S.PHON: ma puɾesu sato de? mbuwa qsija da kija de posai sato ma kesun s'a miʦux peni miʦux sato ma kai kai a qsija kii de kika gei ta ħnuwaun di maanu di ħe a basounsu qsija kii di ma.
S.FORM: ma puresu sato de? mbuwa qsiya da kiya de posai sato ma kesun s'a micux peni micux sato ma kai kai a qsiya kii de kika gei ta hnuwaun di maanu di he a basounsu qsiya kii di ma.
S.PHON: ma puɾesu sato de? mbuwa qsija da kija de posai sato ma kesun s'a miʦux peni miʦux sato ma kai kai a qsija kii de kika gei ta ħnuwaun di maanu di ħe a basounsu qsija kii di ma.
S.TRANSL: 你等到水沸騰以後放入砂糖,攪拌砂糖,等到水煮開以後,就是那樣什麼的,然後水煮開以後把火關掉使水冷卻
Wait until the water boils, put sugar, and stir. When the water is boiled again, turn off the fire and let water cool down to room temperature.

S.FORM: a tleetu de? kika posai kayu ka anu ka ume ka di ma kika posai tleetu qsiyasu hnpuresu de posai a po a cuwaqi ume hiya ka qsiya di kiya nanak.
S.PHON: a tleetu de? kika posai kaju ka anu ka ume ka di ma kika posai tleetu qsijasu ħnpuɾesu de posai a po a ʦuwaqi ume ħija ka qsija di kija nanak.
S.FORM: a tleetu de? kika posai kayu ka anu ka ume ka di ma kika posai tleetu qsiyasu hnpuresu de posai a po a cuwaqi ume hiya ka qsiya di kiya nanak.
S.PHON: a tleetu de? kika posai kaju ka anu ka ume ka di ma kika posai tleetu qsijasu ħnpuɾesu de posai a po a ʦuwaqi ume ħija ka qsija di kija nanak.

TRANSL.notes: 冷卻後把梅子放到甕裡,然後把水倒入甕子裡的梅子那兒.這個梅子的做法就只有這樣了(我就講到這了).

S.TRANSL: 冷卻後把梅子放到甕裡,然後把水倒入甕子裡的梅子那兒.這個梅子的做法就只有這樣了 .

TRANSL.notes: When water you cook cools down, put plums in the pot, and then pour that water. This is just the way I know to make plums. (That's all I know.)

S.TRANSL: When water you cook cools down, put plums in the pot, and then pour that water. This is just the way I know to make plums.

S.FORM: kiya sato peni qsiya sato kiya qsiya hnpuresu sato kiya cuwaqi ume hiya di tele tleetu da.
S.PHON: kija sato peni qsija sato kija qsija ħnpuɾesu sato kija ʦuwaqi ume ħija di tele tleetu da.
S.FORM: kiya sato peni qsiya sato kiya qsiya hnpuresu sato kiya cuwaqi ume hiya di tele tleetu da.
S.PHON: kija sato peni qsija sato kija qsija ħnpuɾesu sato kija ʦuwaqi ume ħija di tele tleetu da.
S.TRANSL: 就是那個煮過的糖水,就倒在那個甕裡的梅子上,當然那個糖水要冷卻常溫的.
Pour sugared water you boiled into the pot of plums. Sugared water of course has to be cooled to room temperature.

S.FORM: um di um kiya da baka di.
S.PHON: um di um kija da baka di.
S.FORM: um di um kiya da baka di.
S.PHON: um di um kija da baka di.
S.TRANSL: 好了,夠了.
That's it.
